title: Dota 2
description: Unique content in the minecraft world from the famous Dota 2 game is waiting for you in this mod!
body:
# Welcome to the Dota Minecraft project / Добро пожаловать в проект Dota Minecraft
![dota](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7775f561a315f1f9baeaffe2b85af80f14081ff9.jpeg)

In the mod you will see everything related to the world of Dota 2

Weapons, Mobs, Buildings, Mechanics, and more

![dota](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6f420da0849585ceb561e153499ec44f0c7fc2b9.jpeg)

The mod is under active development

Follow the updates and read the changelog

![dota](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0d4c719fff4fd6db2cbf365e4c07b9eee21fc32b.jpeg)

Each update brings and takes away content

Each patch is unique, so you are given the opportunity to play on the one you like best

![dota](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7704e1697529c4be6b0983b32c6771f1d3707cbe.jpeg)

The mod is regularly updated and improved

Some mechanics are constantly being added and temporarily removed

![dota](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/35afea3b413a0f4af152ad6036f73e009164daaf.jpeg)

You can safely follow all the updates on our Discord server

За всеми обновлениями вы можете спокойно следить в нашем Discord сервере

Обязательно переходите на наш Discord Сервер, там вы узнаете больше информации о новых вещах и механиках. Сможете делиться и добавлять идеи. Мы тебя ждем!!!

[DISCORD](https://discord.gg/Gn5hn4G8cg) RU/ENG
[TELEGRAM](https://t.me/ragnar4ick) RU
